since_last: 60% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.17% · Gold +0.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 60% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.03%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.03%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ASML is the standout at +4.41%
cards.body: Leaders: ASML +4.41%, AMBA +3.90%, INTC +3.50%, SPCX +3.10%, MU +3.02%. Laggards: HON -1.40%, BABA -1.37%, ORCL -1.18%, GOOGL -0.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.10% at $208.05
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
